home.heroTitle: Legal certainty for business and life.
home.heroLead: Insolvency, commercial and IT law, real estate and litigation — clear advice, fast action, and a price you know up front.
home.trustLabel: Trusted by entrepreneurs, companies and investors across Slovakia
home.servTitle: Six areas where we represent you
home.servLead: We focus on law for entrepreneurs, companies and investors. Pick an area — see exactly what we handle, at what price, and how we work together.
home.whyTitle: Three steps to a clear solution

why.title: Book a consultation
why.desc: Online or in person. Choose a slot and describe your situation — first reply within 24 hours.

why.title: We agree the plan and price
why.desc: We propose a solution and a fixed price up front. No hourly surprises.

why.title: We handle it
why.desc: We take the matter off your plate and keep you informed at every step.

home.teamTitle: The people who will stand by you
home.teamLead: A well-coordinated team of attorneys with real experience in insolvency, corporate law and litigation.
home.blogLead: Practical articles for business owners. No extra theory.
home.ctaBandTitle: Got a legal problem? Let’s start today.
home.ctaBandLead: Your first consultation is non-binding. Pick a slot — online or at our office.

team.note: Full names and professional profiles of our team are available on request.

services.heroLead: From rescuing a company in crisis to protecting your data. All with a clear process and a fixed price.
services.packagesLead: Selected services can be ordered online at a known price. More complex matters we handle after a consultation.

about.heroTitle: A law firm that speaks your language.
about.heroLead: We started with a simple belief: law should be understandable, predictable and fair for the client. After 20 years of practice, it still holds.

values.title: Clarity
values.desc: We explain things so you understand every decision. No empty paragraphs.

values.title: Predictability
values.desc: You know the price and the plan up front, so you decide with a calm mind.

values.title: Results
values.desc: We’re here to resolve your matter — not to drag it out.

story: We founded the firm in 2011 with an ambition to do law differently — closer to the entrepreneur and further from needless complexity.
Today we’re a coordinated team guiding companies from formation through growth to crisis situations. We focus on insolvency, corporate and IT law, real estate and litigation.
We believe the best lawyer is the one you understand. So we explain every matter in human terms and state the price up front.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: Fill in the form and we’ll reply within one business day. Or book a consultation slot right away.
contact.fConsent: I agree to the processing of my personal data.
contact.sentLead: We’ll get back to you within one business day.

booking.title: Book a consultation
booking.payNote: Consultation (45 min) · non-binding. We’ll get back to you to confirm the slot.
booking.doneLead: We’ll get back to you shortly to confirm your consultation slot.

shop.heroTitle: Legal services you can order online
shop.heroLead: One-off fixed-price legal packages, ready-made templates to download, and monthly subscriptions for companies. No waiting, no surprises.
shop.pkgLead: A specific service at a known price. Ideal when you need to resolve a single matter.
shop.tplLead: Professionally prepared templates you can adapt in minutes. Download instantly after payment.
tplTrust: In line with current Slovak legislation
shop.subsLead: Keep an attorney on hand for a fixed monthly price. Pick your hours — we handle the rest.
shop.refSentence: We’ve helped over 600 companies, developers and entrepreneurs across Slovakia keep calm in legal matters.
shop.refNote: Client logo slots — to be replaced with real logos.

checkout.title: Complete your order
checkout.doneLead: We’ve sent a confirmation and invoice to your e-mail. Your templates are ready to download in your account.

footer.tag: Law firm registered with the Slovak Bar Association.
footer.fine: This website is for general information only and is not legal advice.

consent.text: We use cookies — essential ones to run the site and, with your consent, to measure traffic.
